authors: Denise Fechner J. Christian Pentzold a University of Bremen
raw_title: Predictive Data Stories: Characterizing a Nascent Data-Journalistic Genre
title_en: Predictive Data Stories: Characterizing a Nascent Data-Journalistic Genre
title_zh: 预测性数据故事：描述一种新兴的数据新闻类型
plain_summary_zh: 这篇研究探讨了一种新的数据新闻形式——预测性数据故事。研究者分析了这种新兴类型的特点，帮助人们理解数据新闻如何利用预测分析来讲述未来可能发生的故事。
plain_summary_en: This research examines a new form of data journalism called predictive data stories. The study analyzes the characteristics of this emerging genre, helping to understand how data journalism uses predictive analytics to tell stories about possible future events.
research_direction_zh: 探索数据新闻的创新形式和发展趋势，特别是预测性叙事在新闻实践中的应用和影响。
research_direction_en: Exploring innovative forms and development trends in data journalism, particularly the application and impact of predictive storytelling in journalistic practice.
